canto_title: The Encounter with the Giants and the Descent with Antaeus

scenes.summary: Dante describes a stinging sensation that serves as a metaphor for the transition into this new realm.
A sudden, loud horn blast interrupts the silent descent through the darkness.
The narrator compares the power of the horn's sound to the historical legends of Charlemagne and Orlando.
Dante mistakes the distant, massive shapes for towers and asks Virgil for clarification.
Virgil corrects Dante, revealing that the 'towers' are actually giants standing in the pit.
As the fog dissipates, Dante's fear increases as the true scale of the giants becomes visible.
The giants appear to Dante like the massive, fortified walls of a walled city.
Dante observes the specific, massive body parts of the giants that are visible through the gloom.
Dante reflects on how Nature created these giants as powerful weapons for the god of war.
Dante describes the immense, almost impossible scale of one of the giants.
A giant lets out a terrifying, unintelligible roar.
Virgil sternly tells the giant to use his leash to vent his anger rather than shouting.
Virgil identifies the giant as Nembrot and instructs Dante to ignore his strange language.
The travelers encounter a second, even more ferocious giant who is bound by a chain.
Virgil explains that this giant, Fialte, is punished for challenging the power of Jupiter.
Dante expresses a desire to see even more massive giants like Briareus.
Virgil tells Dante that they will soon encounter Antaeus, who will guide them further.
A violent movement by a giant causes a sudden, terrifying tremor.
The giant Antaeus emerges from his cave into the valley.
Virgil addresses Antaeus, praising his strength but commanding him to lower them down.
Antaeus responds to Virgil by reaching out and lifting the travelers.
Virgil grabs Dante to ensure he is held safely during the sudden movement.
Dante describes the disorienting sensation of being lowered into the depths.
The travelers arrive at the very bottom of the pit, where Lucifer resides.
